item.title: Top 10 Best Sci fi indie movies from last years
item.description:
The Artifice Girl (2022) - A team of special agents discovers a revolutionary new computer program to bait and trap online predators. After teaming up with the program’s troubled developer, they soon find that the AI is rapidly advancing beyond its original purpose.
If You Were the Last (2023) - Adrift in their broken-down space shuttle with little hope of rescue, two astronauts argue over whether they’re better off spending their remaining days as friends or something more.
Mondays: See You ‘This’ Week! (2022) - Akemi Yoshikawa discovers that her whole office is stuck in a time loop, repeating the same stressful work week over and over. Together with her colleagues she has to find out how to break the loop.
Jules (2023) - A flying saucer lands in the backyard of an elderly suburbanite with memory problems, who forms a bond with the scared alien inside.
Synchronic (2019) - Two New Orleans paramedics’ lives are ripped apart after encountering a series of horrific deaths linked to a designer drug with bizarre, otherworldly effects.
They Cloned Tyrone (2023) - A series of eerie events thrusts an unlikely trio onto the trail of a nefarious government conspiracy lurking directly beneath their neighborhood.
Significant Other (2022) - Ruth and Harry decide to take a romantic backpacking trip through the Pacific Northwest, but amongst the beautiful scenery, Ruth makes an unexpected discovery that sets her off on a strange, frightening new path. The couple aren’t alone in the woods, and they might not be the same when they come out…if they come out.
The Antares Paradox (2022) - In a race against the clock, Alexandra will be forced to choose how to spend the next hours: facing a critic family drama or trying to bring an answer to one of humanity’s most important questions.
No One Will Save You (2023) - An exiled anxiety-ridden homebody must battle an alien who’s found its way into her home.
Palm Springs (2020) - When carefree Nyles and reluctant maid of honor Sarah have a chance encounter at a Palm Springs wedding, things get complicated when they find themselves unable to escape the venue, themselves, or each other. (Someone posted an old top 10 scifi indie movies that I did 10 years ago, so I did a new one, I hope you like it )
item.dc:creator: CloneN7

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Potato's Daily Dirties
item.description:
Life is chaos. Big things irl good chaos! Also I has so many memes to sort and my cake day and my posting deviousness for two years is coming. Yay! I has a Deviousness discord server! We have a general area for memes and discussions of all different SFWish topics! We have gaming fun! I am really bad about running events and being consistent cause irl always comes first. I do randomly show up in vc and game. We have a 7 Days to Die casual server with no horde nights to explore the full release! We also do Helldivers 2, We Need To Go Deeper, and we have done some Unrailed. Random games go on sale on steam and I am like. I wanna play! All are welcome who want to game or watch us game or just hang out feel free to hop into the vc. please do be respectful if we are in game let us chat for the game. We have an opt in kink area for dirtier conversations and then a role locked area for deeper kink discussions! (It is role locked because we take privacy and security very seriously and the discord is a place with real people sharing and things being shared is a privilege) Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
The above image was made by the wonderful @PyroDragon! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share links to their dumps and be an all around dragony dragon! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness I was asked to help promote a fellow imgurian's twitch stream and cat surgery fundraiser @ElbowDeepInPackages Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/erosrogziel last update: https://imgur.com/a/f4HcNvV The consult appointment was on July 9th, at that alone costed $180. She's up to $504 as of Sunday night, but that still leaves her far short of the expected costs. There will be additional costs for the procedure itself: Ko-FI: https://ko-fi.com/erosrogziel As a fellow imgurian who has asked for help when my own kitty was distressed I hope the community can halps them too!
I love you *my* Daddy. Friendly reminder I am claimed so I would appreciate keeping that in mind when making comments towards me see dis: https://imgur.com/JipV5UR Thanks to everyone who continues to follow my posts even when I disappear randomly for a bit. I am going to keep making dis series for a bit. This is how many memes I sort through to pick the deviousness ones out. Feel free to hit the follow button as I wont be doing a ping list for this series. Deviousness posts will now be on fridays and will contain the sorted memes still. "Our full potential is on the other side of fear." "Without trust, any relationship is bound to fail." -These are from the Skywalkers documentary I watched the other night. I liked em. I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.title: The relief this mum must of felt! They're really are good people out there folks!
item.description: Autism or not, we always worry about our kids. It's great to know when people have been kind and supportive to them! Edit : I apologise for the 'must of' instead of 'must have', not going to lie, it's a common mistake I make if I don't proof read! But I hope that doesn't take away from the feel good post ?? (originally posted by @DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2 on 2023-08-21 19:26:36)

item.title: Voice Actress Atsuko Tanaka has passed away at age 61
item.description:
Some of her most famous roles include Motoko Kusanagi in "Ghost in the Shell" (the original film and Stand Alone Complex), Lisa Lisa in "JoJo’s Bizarre Adventures", Konan in "Naruto", Bayonetta in "Bayonetta", Flamme in "Frieren: Beyond Journey’s End" ... and many more She also was the main dub actress for American shows/films that aired in Japan. She dubbed especially for Nicole Kidman - https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Atsuko_Tanaka_%28voice_actress%29#Dubbing_roles
On August 20, 2024, my mother, the voice actress Atsuko Tanaka, peacefully passed away. To all the fans who loved Atsuko Tanaka, To everyone in the industry who worked with her during her lifetime, I would like to express my deepest gratitude on behalf of her. It is with great regret that I must inform you of this parent-child relationship in such a manner. As per her wishes, I will not disclose the specific illness, but she bravely fought it for over a year with grace, humor, and strength. I believe it was a life that was truly characteristic of Atsuko Tanaka. I feel truly blessed to have had such a proud mother. Lastly, Please do not forget that Atsuko Tanaka poured her heart and soul into the characters she loved and brought to life. And Atsuko Tanaka, the voice actress, herself. With love and respect for the woman and voice actress that was my mother, I sign this message with love. August 20, 2024 Hikaru Tanaka
item.dc:creator: Pasquinel

item.title: Keep Australia Beautiful Week..but how?
item.description:
https://www.kabc.wa.gov.au/campaigns
Delicious delicious planning
https://www.kabc.wa.gov.au/campaigns/keep-australia-beautiful-week There are so many locals across Brisbane and Queensland converting their urban spaces into gardens. One such effort is the Shady Lanes https://www.facebook.com/shadylanes.com.au/ (originally posted by @QueenslandConservationCouncil on 2023-08-21 10:54:04)

item.title: A little bit late there, Mouse.
item.description: https://www.cnn.com/2024/08/19/business/disney-arbitration-wrongful-death-lawsuit-intl-hnk/index.html The correct time to make this decision would've been at the moment they were all in the courtroom for the first time. This is what happens when you let a shark culture in the office dominate for too long - it becomes normalized and it ends up hurting the wrong people. Who wants to bet the PR department bludgeoned the living daylights out of Legal?

item.dc:creator: choo

item.title: I'm an alcoholic
item.description: So I've pretty much had 2 or 3 mixers a night for like the last 10 years, I've been out of work for the last year and its progressed to like 4 or 5 a night most nights. My 5pm has become 3pm. My wife and I talked about it and we agree its a problem. I've stopped drinking cold turkey. I went to my doctor and talked to them about my addiction too. I hope to just put off alcohol for good, I'm really just sick if it. I know its only been a week, i hope i can stay strong.
item.dc:creator: Stressicca

item.title: Some Programming Humor For A Niche Audience
item.description:
1.
2. Cutie
3. This is painfully true
4. A programmer in nature
5. Ain't the future amazing?
6. Got us there
7
8. I wrote the code already, why I gotta write documentation
9. HOOOOLD
10
11. I'll just edit this line of code, what could go wrong
12. Casting every data type to string to get a table to merge correctly...
13. It already hates us, doesn't it?
15. Thank you if you made this far in the dump! Let me share with you that as well as posting on Imgur, I'm also working on a game of my own. A passion project, if you will. It's a "Stanley Parable" inspired first person narrative game. If you like the humor of this dump, you might actually like the game to (at least what my friend on Discord tells me, that one friend). Anyway please wishlist it helps small game devs like me: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. Have a great week!

item.title: GOOD LABOR NEWS: Uber and Lyft now required to pay Massachusetts rideshare drivers $32 an hour
item.description: Drivers will get benefits too, but will still be independent contractors. It's a damned good start! -------------- Rideshare drivers in Massachusetts will soon get company-provided benefits, as well as a minimum pay of $32.50 per hour, starting on August 15th. That’s thanks to a new settlement between the state and rideshare companies Uber and Lyft, four years after Attorney General Andrea Campbell sued the companies, asserting their drivers ought to be considered employees under state law. The two companies also agreed to pay a combined $175 million, the bulk of which will be paid out to “current and former drivers who were underpaid by the companies,” Campbell’s office announced yesterday. The office says it will release details about who qualifies and how to apply “in coming weeks.” Despite the settlement and the original thrust of the suit, drivers will still be considered independent contractors. Still, drivers in the state will get yearly inflation-based pay raises and other employee-style benefits, such as being able to earn up to 40 hours of sick leave a year, paid at $20 per hour. Uber and Lyft will also give drivers stipends so they can buy healthcare and sign up for the state’s family and medical leave program, and will cover work-related injuries. To ensure they’re complying with the agreement, the companies have to carry out annual audits and submit reports to the Attorney General’s office. Punishment for violations could include “any applicable restitution, fines, and penalties,” according to the published settlement. The rideshare companies have mostly avoided being regulated this way in California after successfully persuading voters there to pass a 2020 law that exempted businesses from being required to treat gig workers as employees; that’s been winding its way through state courts. The Massachusetts settlement accounts for that, requiring them to stop supporting a similar ballot initiative campaign. Door Dash and Instacart have also said they’re backing off, according to local reporting by WBUR. https://www.theverge.com/2024/6/29/24188851/uber-lyft-driver-minimum-wage-settlement-massachusetts-benefits-healthcare-sick-leave
item.dc:creator: doxydad1
